creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Created attachment 240785
Update patch

I was trying to make net-mgmt/fastnetmon cooperate with net/gobgp, but this is another story. As a side effect created this patch for updating net/gobgp to the most recent version. Port passes testport and builds fine in poudriere. Please commit when you'll have a while.
